Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x82C7 "THRUSTERBALL-3D00-82C7" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $3d00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Thruster Ball.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $3D00 which sets all of the nibbles in colour RAM to $09 to allow the game to be displayed correctly.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $FEB7. However the true start address is $82C7.
